posts.author: norawa (Nora)
posts.cookedHtml:
Join us live on April 28
11:00 EDT | 16:00 BST
Register here

We will be covering this month’s new features releases for monday’s work management product:

Boards
Sync granular board permissions with managed templates
Item ID - custom key
Group by formula
Sorting by group
Views - allow to pin multiple views.

Workforms
Prefilled values
Post submission flow

monday AI
AI columns - updates as input

posts.cookedHtml:
Nora:

11:00 EDT

Will the webinar be recorded?

posts.author: norawa (Nora)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes! Make sure to register and recording will be sent after

posts.author: Jmergen (Jessica Mergen)
posts.cookedHtml: When registering, are we supposed to receive an invite with a link to watch the webinar? I’ve registered twice, and have not received one. Thanks!
